label: 上下文压缩
description: Compress only Buddy conversation history into session_summary; user messages, Buddy Home, capability results, and public replies stay outside this subgraph.

conversation_history.name: conversation_history
conversation_history.description: 当前可用历史上下文包；压缩前由父图输入，写入摘要后由 buddy_history_context_loader 刷新为摘要加摘要后的原文。

compaction_plan.name: compaction_plan
compaction_plan.description: 压缩计划，包含保护头尾、摘要范围、预算和跳过理由。

protected_recent_history.name: protected_recent_history
protected_recent_history.description: 需要在后续 prompt 中继续保留原文的最近会话片段。

session_summary_candidate.name: session_summary_candidate
session_summary_candidate.description: 新的会话摘要候选，面向后续 Buddy 回复上下文。

compaction_report.name: compaction_report
compaction_report.description: 压缩审计报告：触发原因、保留/省略数量、风险和写入决定。

should_write_summary.name: should_write_summary
should_write_summary.description: 是否应该通过 Buddy Home Writer 更新 session_summary。

writer_input.name: writer_input
writer_input.description: 交给 Buddy Home Writer 的低风险 session_summary.update 命令计划。

session_summary_write_success.name: session_summary_write_success
session_summary_write_success.description: Buddy Home Writer 是否成功应用 session_summary.update。

applied_session_summary_commands.name: applied_session_summary_commands
applied_session_summary_commands.description: 已应用的 session summary 写回命令和 revision 信息。

skipped_session_summary_commands.name: skipped_session_summary_commands
skipped_session_summary_commands.description: 被跳过的 session summary 写回命令。

session_summary_write_result.name: session_summary_write_result
session_summary_write_result.description: Buddy Home Writer 写回摘要。

plan_compaction.name: 规划压缩范围
plan_compaction.description: Plans which parts of conversation_history should remain raw and which parts should be summarized.

config.taskInstruction: Use only conversation_history to create compaction_plan JSON. conversation_history is the current history context package; without an existing summary it renders full prior history, and with a summary it renders summary plus messages after the summary. Identifiers are available in conversation_history metadata. Include protect_first, protect_last, summary_scope, estimated_omitted_messages, should_summarize, risk_notes, and anti_thrashing_notes. By default preserve a small opening task setup and the most recent 12 to 20 raw messages, and summarize the middle history. This node only writes the plan; the later write node prepares the session_summary.update command.

summarize_context.name: 生成会话摘要
summarize_context.description: Updates the session summary candidate and prepares an auditable writeback command.

config.taskInstruction:
Compress session history only. Use the rendered conversation_history value as the source, preserving any existing summary that is still valid. Read source_run_id and current_session_id from conversation_history metadata. Do not summarize current user_message, Buddy Home, capability_result, or public_response because they are not inputs to this subgraph. Preserve recent raw messages in protected_recent_history Markdown. Summarize middle history, explicit user decisions, task progress, open items, and capability conclusions that already exist in conversation_history into session_summary_candidate Markdown.

Write all of these outputs: compaction_report JSON with source_run_id, current_session_id, omitted_count, protected_count, summary_changed, summary_source_refs, omitted_refs, protected_recent_history_refs, risk_notes, and anti_thrashing_notes; should_write_summary boolean; writer_input JSON. summary_source_refs, omitted_refs, and protected_recent_history_refs must come from conversation_history.source_refs or conversation_history.context_ref.source_refs. writer_input.commands may contain only one session_summary.update command. payload.content must equal session_summary_candidate. payload.source_refs must equal summary_source_refs. payload.source_run_id must equal conversation_history metadata.source_run_id. payload.session_id must equal conversation_history metadata.current_session_id. change_reason should state that session history reached context pressure and was compacted. If the summary did not materially change or risk is too high, set should_write_summary=false and commands=[].

has_summary_update.name: 需要写入摘要?
has_summary_update.description: 只有摘要发生实质更新时才调用 Buddy Home Writer。

write_session_summary.name: 写入会话摘要
write_session_summary.description: 通过 Buddy Home Writer 应用 session_summary.update，并留下 revision。

buddy_home_writer.title: session_summary writeback instruction
buddy_home_writer.content: Use Buddy Home Writer with commands from writer_input.commands. Each command is session_summary.update with payload.content as the complete updated session summary. Use writer_input.run_id as run_id.

config.taskInstruction: 调用 buddy_home_writer。commands 来自 writer_input.commands；run_id 来自 writer_input.run_id。返回写回结果。

reload_conversation_history.name: 刷新历史视图
reload_conversation_history.description: 从运行时上下文重新读取当前 Buddy 会话历史；若刚写入摘要，则输出摘要加摘要后的原文。
